creator: bpurgar@gmail.com
text: It is same problem on 13-release with drm-fbsd-13 and 14-current with drm-kmod-devel. gnome3 wont work (lags/freeze and only progress is seeing when switching beetwen consoles from vt9 to vt2 and back to vt9 for example and so on) when dri3 is enabled on amdgpu_drv. I have matebook with i5-7200u and no problems with intel_drv and dri3/gnome on FreeBSD 13/14.
